raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ja juhs atgreesdamees
fchai Semmē palikfeet/ tad griƀ-
bu es juhs uhstaif iht/ un ne no-
lausiht/ es griƀbu juhs dehftiht/
un ue israveht/ jo man irr jaw
schehl tas Launums/ ko es jums
efmu darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ne bihsteetees preeſch ta
Rehnina no Babel es/ preeſch ka
Waiga juhs bihstatees/ ne bih-
steetees preeſch winna/ fakka
tas KUNGS: Jo es efmu ar
juhs juhs atpestiht/ un juhs is-
glahbt no winna Rohkas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es parahditchu jums
Schehlastbu/ ka winſch pahr
jums apscheliojahs/ un juhs at-
fat uhs fcho Semmi atlaisch.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ja juhs fazzifeet:
Mehs kchai Semmē ne griƀam
valikt/ un ne klaufifeet tai Balſi
ta KUNGA juhsfu Deewa/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Up fazzifeet : Ne/ bet
mehs eefmu uhs Egiptes-Sem-
mi/ fur mehs Katru ne redſekim/
un tahs Trummetes Balkfni ne
dſirdefim/ nedß pehz Maises ts-
falkuſchi bahſim/ un tur griƀ-
bain mehs dſihwoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Nu tad/ tapehz klanfajt
ta KUNGA Wahrdiu/ juhs At-
likuſchee no Juhda/ ta fakka tas
KUNGS Zebaot/ tas Israēta
Dreews: Ja juhs juhsfu Waigu
greesifeet uhs Egipti eet/ un ee-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad tas Sohbins/preeſch
ka juhs bihstatees/ junis Egip-
tes-Seminē panahks/ un tas
Bads/ preeſch ka juhs behda-
jatees/ jums tur no paklatenes
peeſittifees/ un juhs tur nomir-
feet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta buhs wiffeem Wiḣ-
reein/ kas fawu Waigu greese
uhs Egipti eet par Sweschinee-
keem tur mahjoht/ nomire
zaur Sohbinu/ un zaur Bad-
du/ un zaur Mehri/ un teem ne
buhs neweens/ kas atliks/ jeb
kas isbehgs no ta Launuma/ ko
es pahr teem weddifchu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo ta takka tas KUNGS
Zebaot/ tas Israēta Dreews:
Itt ka manna Duſmiba un
manna Bahrsiba irr iṣgahsta
pahr Jerusaleimes Eedsihwota-
jeem/ ta taps manna Bahrsiba
pahr jums iṣgahsta/ kad juhs
uhs Egipti nahkfeet/ un juhs
buhfeet par Nolahdetchanu/ un
par Istrubzinaſchanu/ un par
Laḥstu/ un par Neewaschanu/
un ne redſeet wairß fcho Weetir.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS irr prett
jums ruunaifs/ juhs Atliffutchee
no Juhda/ ne eita uhs Egipti.
Sinnat/ ka es schodeen prett
jums efmu Leezibu Dewis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo juhs peewilſeet juh-
fas Dwehfeles. Jo juhs eſat
manni pee ta KUNGA juhsfu
Deewa fuhtiſcht/ un fazzifscht:
Luhds preeſch mums to KUN-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
